name: Flat Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench and press the weight up until arms are extended, then lower to chest.
instructions: Lie flat on a bench and set your hands just outside shoulder-width.
Unrack the bar and slowly lower it to the middle of your chest.
Press the bar back up explosively to the starting position.

name: Push Ups
description: Support body on hands and toes, lower chest to floor, and push back up.
instructions: Get into a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor.
Push back up to the starting position, keeping your core engaged.

name: Pull Ups
description: Hang from a bar and pull chest to bar, then lower with control.
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Pull yourself up until your chin is over the bar.
Lower yourself back down with a controlled motion.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit and pull the bar down to upper chest, focusing on lats.
instructions: Sit at the lat pulldown machine and grab the wide bar.
Pull the bar down towards your upper chest while squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Slowly return the bar to the starting position.

name: Barbell Squat
description: Barbell on back, squat down until thighs are parallel to floor, then stand up.
instructions: Safely rest the barbell across the back of your shoulders.
Squat down by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Drive back up through your heels to the starting position.

name: Walking Lunges
description: Step forward and lower hips until both knees are bent at 90 degrees.
instructions: Stand tall with a dumbbell in each hand.
Step forward with one leg and lower your hips until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Push off your front foot to stand back up and alternate legs.

name: Overhead Press
description: Press the weight from shoulders to overhead until arms are full extended.
instructions: Hold the barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip.
Press the bar overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Lower the bar back to shoulder height under control.

name: Lateral Raises
description: Raise arms out to sides until parallel to floor, focusing on side delts.
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand by your sides.
Raise your arms straight out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to your sides.

name: Dumbbell Curls
description: Curl weights toward shoulders while keeping elbows stationary.
instructions: Stand holding a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing forward.
Curl the weights towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows fixed by your sides.
Lower the weights back down with control.

name: Tricep Dips
description: Use a bench or bar to lower and raise body using tricep strength.
instructions: Suspend your body on parallel dip bars with your arms locked out.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until they are at a 90-degree angle.
Push back up to the starting position.
